---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new workflow, tool capability, export surface, or runtime improvement.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## What do you want to enable?

Describe the user workflow or capability you want to add.

## Why is it needed?

Explain the gap in the current behavior.

## Proposed Direction

If you already have a preferred approach, describe it here.

## Affected Area

- CLI
- MCP
- Export protocol
- Runtime packaging
- Knowledge bundle
- Local storage
- Documentation

## Additional Context

Add examples, screenshots, or related references here.
